name: sync-my-zettels
description: Single-plugin marketplace that ships sync-my-zettels, a reconciler for an Obsidian vault and an org-roam zettelkasten sharing a folgezettel hierarchy.

plugins.name: sync-my-zettels
plugins.description: Reconcile an Obsidian vault and an org-roam zettelkasten under a shared folgezettel hierarchy. Exposes eight slash commands (inventory, roots, match, assign, normalize, port, repair-links, verify) plus two skills (classify-orphan-note, review-ported-note) that front the sync-my-zettels Python CLI.
